/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libpredator_gate.so -o libpredator_gate.so CMakeFiles/predator_gate_shared.dir/src/ram_wiper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/predator_gate_shared.dir/src/token.cpp.o CMakeFiles/predator_gate_shared.dir/src/fuel_flow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/predator_gate_shared.dir/src/stats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/predator_gate_shared.dir/src/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/predator_gate_shared.dir/src/predator_gate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/predator_gate_shared.dir/src/predator_bridge_api.cpp.o  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
